name: Plains
description: A flat biome with grass and flowers. Villages and passive mobs are common here. Good for building and early farms.

name: Forest
description: A biome with many oak and birch trees. Good for wood. Wolves and foxes can spawn here.

name: Desert
description: A dry biome with sand and cacti. Desert villages and desert temples can spawn here. It does not rain.

name: Mountains
description: A tall biome with exposed stone and ores. Emerald ore and silverfish blocks can be found here. Goats spawn here.

name: Swamp
description: A wetland biome with shallow water, lily pads, and mangroves. Witches and slimes spawn here. Witch huts can be found.

name: Jungle
description: A dense biome with tall trees and vines. Ocelots, parrots, and pandas spawn here. Jungle temples can be found.

name: Ocean
description: A large body of water. Squid, fish, dolphins, and drowned spawn here. Ocean monuments and shipwrecks can be found.

name: Nether Wastes
description: The most common Nether biome. It is made of netherrack and has lava oceans. Piglins and ghasts spawn here.

name: Crimson Forest
description: A red Nether biome with huge crimson fungi. Hoglins and piglins spawn here. Good for crimson wood and pork.

name: Warped Forest
description: A blue Nether biome with huge warped fungi. Endermen are very common here. Good for warped wood and ender pearls.

name: Soul Sand Valley
description: A Nether biome made of soul sand and soul soil. Skeletons and ghasts spawn here. Movement is slowed by soul sand.

name: Basalt Deltas
description: A volcanic Nether biome with basalt and blackstone. Magma cubes and ghasts spawn here. Dangerous terrain.

name: End Highlands
description: The main End biome where chorus plants and end cities generate. Shulkers and endermen are common. Elytra can be found in end cities.
